subject: Keep a current RunPod architecture snapshot for MPI-64
body:
Fabio is concerned that MPI-64 RunPod implementation knowledge is currently stranded in handoffs and plan drift. Please add an explicit note/todo to the MPI-64 plan that future MPI-64 agents must keep a living current-architecture snapshot updated during every session, and that final MPI end-session should promote the validated architecture into durable docs, rules, and project memory.

Recommended shape: create or maintain `.agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-64/current-architecture.md` as the latest truth, not a historical log. It should summarize the active RunPod design: remote engine topology, lifecycle policy, volume/DC rules, Pod image/version rules, custom-node split, secret handling, billing/user responsibility, verification status, and unresolved follow-ups. When implementation changes the design, update this snapshot immediately and leave only a brief plan/events note.

Please do not ask old sessions/agents to backfill this. The plan has drifted too much; the current implementation agent should capture the latest truth going forward.

recent_events.outcome: Created .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-64/current-architecture.md (living latest-truth snapshot). Added Current State pointer + two Phase-5 todos (keep-current-every-session + promote-at-final-end-session) + a Plan Drift pointer. No backfill of old sessions, per request.
